name.ja: <ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>術<rt>じゅつ</rt></ruby>の<ruby>指<rt>し</rt></ruby><ruby>南<rt>なん</rt></ruby><ruby>書<rt>しょ</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: During a turn you have not activated "Handbook to the Spiritual Arts".

effect.en: Excavate the top 5 cards of your Deck. You can destroy up to 1 card on your opponent's field for every 2 excavated Spellcaster Type monsters with 500 or 1900 ATK and 1500 DEF. Place the excavated cards on the bottom of your Deck in any order. If you destroyed 2 cards, you can only attack directly with 1 monster this turn.
